figures.caption: Fig. 3: Thread-level architecture with single-thread loading of LUT into shared memory.
Fig. 4: End-to-end latency (top row) and throughput (bottom row) comparison across three models showing consistent improvements with our optimized NF4 dequantization kernel.
Fig. 2: Memory-level architecture with shared NF4 LUT serving all lookups within the thread block.
Fig. 1: Baseline NF4 dequantization showing bottlenecks (1) 4-level tree decoding with branching overhead and warp divergence (2) Global memory code access at 290 clock cycles per operation
